productDisplayName: Fossil Men White Dial Chronograph Watch FS4647
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezel, stainless steel backDial style: White dial, has hour, minutes and seconds hands, markingsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a screw and two push-buttons to reset the time and functionsStrap style: Black leather strap, secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
